title: HpcRoutingSpine
description: Routing spine index that binds (objectKind, tier, repo) triples to schemas, invariants, metrics, math constraints, and CHAT_DIRECTOR phases.

routingSpineVersion.description: Semantic version of the routing spine schema instance (e.g. 1.0.0).

updatedAt.description: Last update time in ISO-8601 format.

docHints.description: Optional human-facing hints used to generate documentation.

overview.description: Short description of how to read and use the routing spine.

objectKindNotes.description: Per-objectKind doc hints keyed by objectKind name.

summary.description: High-level explanation of what this objectKind represents.

usage.description: Guidance for where and when this objectKind is typically authored.

mathConstraints.description: Catalog of named math constraints (formulas, inequalities, derived ranges) that can be referenced from routes.

objectKinds.description: Entries describing routing rules per objectKind.

tier.description: Canonical tier identifier used across the constellation.

phase.description: CHAT_DIRECTOR phase at which this objectKind is legal.

repoName.description: Canonical repository name within the HorrorPlace constellation.

invariantCode.description: Invariant code, validated against the invariants spine in CI.

metricCode.description: Entertainment metric code, validated against the entertainment metrics spine in CI.

mathConstraint.description: Structural descriptor for a math constraint that can be applied to routes.

version.description: Semantic version for this constraint definition.

inputs.description: List of invariants/metrics this constraint reads.

output.description: Invariant or metric this constraint governs.

expressionRef.description: Pointer to the constraint’s formal definition, e.g. docs/formulas/sprFromInvariants.v1.md or schemas/formulas/sprFromInvariants.v1.json.

spineRef.description: Optional pointer into the schema spine formula catalog for cross-checking.

appliesTo.description: Optional list of objectKinds or explicit route identifiers this constraint applies to.

routeEntry.description: Routing rule for a specific (tier, repo) combination.

id.description: Opaque identifier for this route entry, used by CI and tooling.

schemaRef.description: Canonical schema URI/ID this object must conform to (e.g. schemas/contracts/event-contract-v1.json).

defaultTargetPath.description: Repo-relative directory root for this kind/tier/repo (e.g. events/, regions/cards/).

registryRef.description: Path and schema for the registry that must reference this object, e.g. registry/registry-events.ndjson.

invariants.description: Invariant codes this route requires as bands.

metrics.description: Entertainment metrics this route expects as targets/bands.

constraints.description: List of mathConstraint ids that must hold for this route.

additionalPropertiesRequired.description: If true, the bound contract schema must set additionalProperties:false at the top level.

docHints.description: Optional human-facing notes for this route.

summary.description: Short description of this route’s purpose.

usage.description: Guidance for when this route should be selected.

objectKindEntry.description: Routing rules for a single objectKind across tiers and repos.

name.description: Object kind name (e.g. moodContract, eventContract, regionContractCard, seedContractCard).

description.description: Human-facing description used in generated documentation.

allowedTiers.description: List of tiers where this objectKind is legal.

routes.description: Per-(tier, repo) routing rules. CI enforces uniqueness of (tier, repo) pairs within this array.
